root_cause: The shared retention harness passed the Factorio 0.17 --benchmark-runs option to earlier binaries that support --benchmark and --benchmark-ticks but not --benchmark-runs.
fix: Emit --benchmark-runs only when the declared target line is Factorio 0.17.
regression: Test-MIRPowerShellQuality requires benchmark-runs to be gated by the target profile's Factorio line.
candidate_implication: The affected candidates require corrected retention reruns and fresh seals; no published version is affected.
